allow: Bash(node -e "const {sampleProducts} = require\('./src/data/products.js'\); console.log\('Total:', sampleProducts.length\); const sel = sampleProducts.filter\(p=>p.category==='selecciones'\); const club = sampleProducts.filter\(p=>p.category==='clubes'\); console.log\('Selecciones:', sel.length\); console.log\('Clubes:', club.length\); console.log\('\\n-- Selecciones --'\); sel.forEach\(p=>console.log\(' ', p.name\)\); console.log\('\\n-- Clubes --'\); club.forEach\(p=>console.log\(' ', p.name\)\);")
